title: Chief Technology Officer
description:
932 Design Group is looking a hands-on Chief Technology Officer (CTO) to lead our technology vision and build the foundation for scalable growth. This role is ideal for a technology leader who thrives in a fast-paced, highly regulated fintech environment, balancing strategic leadership with deep technical execution.

The CTO will lead the development of secure, high-performance, and scalable platforms, ensuring technology decisions align closely with business objectives, regulatory requirements, and customer needs.

Responsibilities

Technology Strategy, Leadership & Execution

  • Define and execute the company’s long-term technology and IT strategy aligned with business goals.
  • Advise executive leadership on technology trends, risks, and opportunities.
  • Lead digital transformation initiatives to drive innovation and competitive advantage.
  • Establish technology governance, standards, and best practices across the organization.
  • Lead and assemble a diverse, high-performing team of technologists/ engineers/ innovators to develop AI-driven initiatives across the organization.

Product Development, Architecture & Platforms

  • Oversee the design and delivery of secure, scalable, and high-performance platforms.
  • Ensure system reliability, scalability, and performance while meeting business and customer requirements.
  • Optimize application architecture, system integrations, and development processes to support rapid growth.


Security, Risk Management & Compliance

  • Own the cybersecurity and technology risk management strategy.
  • Safeguard digital transactions, sensitive data, and mission-critical systems.
  • Ensure compliance with financial regulations, data protection laws, and industry standards.
  • Lead audits, regulatory reviews, disaster recovery planning, and business continuity initiatives.


IT Infrastructure, Operations & DevOps

  • Oversee cloud infrastructure, networks, and enterprise systems to ensure high availability and resilience.
  • Drive DevOps adoption, automation, and continuous improvement to enhance efficiency and reliability.
  • Manage IT budgets, resources, and operational performance.


Team Leadership, Collaboration & Vendor Management

  • Build, mentor, and lead high-performing engineering and IT teams.
  • Foster a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.
  • Collaborate closely with business leaders, product teams, and external stakeholders.
  • Manage third-party vendors and partners to ensure quality, performance, and value.


Innovation & Technology Enablement

  • Evaluate and adopt emerging technologies such as cloud, AI, automation, and data platforms.
  • Enable data-driven decision-making and support customer-facing product innovation.
  • Ensure technology solutions remain modern, flexible, and future-ready.
  • Champion creativity and experimentation in the design and development of AI-powered solutions, automation, and intelligent systems that enhance operational efficiency, unlock insights, and support business growth.
  • Translate business challenges into practical, scalable AI solutions while ensuring ethical use, security, and regulatory compliance.


Qualifications

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in computer science, information technology, engineering, or a related field.
  • Proven experience as a CTO or senior technology leadership role.
  • Strong background in building and scaling secure, cloud-based platforms.
  • Extensive understanding of software development, IT infrastructure and cybersecurity best practices.
  • Strong strategic thinking, problem-solving skills, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
  • Hands-on knowledge of AI-driven creative workflows, including generative design, BIM, advanced visualization technologies, and other AI applications, applied to interior design, architecture industry.


Please apply by sending in your CV and cover letter to samantha.koh@932designgroup.com.

postedCompany.description: Currently based in Singapore, with branch offices in Malaysia Kuala Lumpur, and Vietnam Ho Chi Minh City, 932 Design is an award-winning design consultancy formally founded in twenty eleven. Our professional services include Design Consultation and Design & Build Services. Here at 932, the design methodology and processes have been applied to Private Residences, Condominium Development's Project Interior Design, Show-Galleries & Units, Actual In-situ Show-Units, Commercial Offices & Lobbies, Boutique Hotels, Resorts, Serviced-Apartments and Retails.
postedCompany.name: 932 DESIGN GROUP PRIVATE LIMITED
